items.title: Ashwin sees 'no reason' why Kohli and Rohit shouldn't play 2027 ODI World Cup
items.summary: "Till you have experienced cricketers like Virat and Rohit, going for an away World Cup, you should extract as much experience as you can from those," Ashwin said
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
